name: node-progress
title: node-progress
description:
Flexible ascii progress bar
Node.js module to flexibly create progress bars for CLI user
interfaces.
Supports back-and-forth movement and colors.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-progress because Flexible ascii progress bar.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-progress with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-progress --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
